prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library with warm wood textures. Natsu Starling, a feminine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, and Natsu Brightford 068, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, stand together. They raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, creating glowing soft mana ribbons between them. Readable cooperative body motion, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the arcane library. Natsu Brightford 068 gently adjusts their hand position to guide the magic, causing the soft mana ribbons to stabilize and glow steadily between both characters. Both maintain calm, focused expressions during this cooperative teamwork. No combat harm, no text, no watermark.
